reason: Graphiti.add_episode() dedup queries timeout at scale (912 errors at 73% failure). O(n) fulltext search on RELATES_TO index becomes bottleneck. Direct FalkorDB writes eliminate dedup overhead.
outcome: 0 errors ingesting 1268 episodes in single run. 100% success rate.
impact: Foundation ingestion now reliable. Can process entire ledger without cascading failures.

decision: Restart karma-server with proper volume mounts and LEDGER_PATH
reason: consciousness.jsonl write failing: [Errno 2] No such file or directory '/ledger/memory.jsonl'. Container doesn't have volume mounted. Default path wrong.
alternative_considered: Rebuild docker image with correct path
outcome: Restarted with -v /opt/seed-vault/memory_v1/ledger:/ledger:rw and LEDGER_PATH=/ledger/memory.jsonl. Consciousness loop confirms 'Loop started — interval: 60s'
impact: Consciousness loop now capable of writing entries. Distillation cycle can persist insights.

decision: Revert system prompt edits to backup (server.js.bak)
reason: SyntaxError: Invalid or unexpected token at line 365. Attempted to inject autonomy messaging but created literal newline in JS string. Multiple fix attempts failed (encoding issues, em-dash handling).
outcome: Reverted to server.js.bak. Hub-bridge starts cleanly. Syntax valid. System prompt reverted to baseline.
impact: Hub-bridge operational but system prompt autonomy messaging deferred. Will attempt again with proper testing.

reason: Router logs showed 401 errors from both providers. Keys expired or invalid. MiniMax and GLM-5 fully funded but unusable.
outcome: Both keys updated and restarted karma-server. Router now shows all 4 models registered. MiniMax responds to direct tests.
impact: Primary models restored. Can use optimized providers instead of relying on fallback.

decision: Test full stack end-to-end before building resurrection spine
reason: Verify foundation actually works before building persistence layer. Don't build resurrection for broken system.
alternative_considered: Trust that it's working, start building files
outcome: Hub-bridge /v1/chat responds ok:true. Tool-use infrastructure works. Consciousness loop confirmed running. Vault writes confirmed (status:201). Graceful error handling verified.
impact: Foundation proven operational. Resurrection spine now makes sense.

decision: Build resurrection spine files: identity.json, invariants.json, direction.md, checkpoint/
reason: Foundation verified. Spine provides persistent context across sessions. Both Claude Code and Karma read from canonical source. No re-invention, no parallel truth.
outcome: Created identity.json (who Karma is), invariants.json (what she never violates), direction.md (what we're building), checkpoint/known_good_v1/state_export.json (current state snapshot).
impact: Resurrection system now has stable identity definition. Next: extraction + resurrection scripts.
